requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — KC 62133 (KC Safety Certification)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——KC 62133（KC安全认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——KC 62133（KC安全認證）

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the South Korean market must meet the mandatory safety obligations of the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act. The applicable safety standard is KC 62133 (the Korean adoption of IEC 62133, covering portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries), which is the basis for KC Safety Certification (안전인증). Type testing must be performed by a KATS-designated certification/testing body — such as KTC (Korea Testing Certification), KTL (Korea Testing Laboratory), or KTR (Korea Testing & Research Institute) — and certification generally also requires an initial factory inspection plus periodic post-certification factory audits. The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical performance limits. The KC certificate and KC Mark are mandatory before the cells or packs can be lawfully sold.
summary.zh: 投放韩国市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须满足《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》的强制安全义务。适用安全标准为KC 62133（韩国采纳IEC 62133，涵盖便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池），是KC安全认证（안전인증）的依据。型式检测须由KATS指定的认证/检测机构进行——如KTC（韩国试验认证院）、KTL（韩国产业技术试验院）或KTR（韩国化学融合试验研究院）——认证通常还要求进行初始工厂检查及认证后的定期工厂审核。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、撞击、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值。在电芯或电池组合法销售前，KC证书及KC标志为强制要求。
summary.zht: 投放韓國市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須滿足《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》的強制安全義務。適用安全標準為KC 62133（韓國採納IEC 62133，涵蓋便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池），是KC安全認證（안전인증）的依據。型式檢測須由KATS指定的認證/檢測機構進行——如KTC（韓國試驗認證院）、KTL（韓國產業技術試驗院）或KTR（韓國化學融合試驗研究院）——認證通常還要求進行初始工廠檢查及認證後的定期工廠審核。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、撞擊、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值。在電芯或電池組合法銷售前，KC證書及KC標誌為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: KC 62133 — Korean adoption of IEC 62133: Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications (KATS)
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KC Safety Certification (안전인증) framework
KS C IEC 62133 — referenced Korean Industrial Standard

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by South Korea's KATS-designated certification bodies or under the KC Safety Certification conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，不被韩国KATS指定认证机构认可，也不被KC安全认证合格评定路径接受。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，不被韓國KATS指定認證機構認可，也不被KC安全認證合格評定路徑接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain KC Safety Certification (안전인증) testing to KC 62133 from a KATS-designated body (KTC / KTL / KTR). Because both KC 62133 and GB 31241 trace back to IEC 62133, the technical content overlaps, but a GB 31241 report does not establish KC conformity. Key gaps: (1) testing must be repeated or evaluated by a Korea-designated lab; (2) an initial factory inspection plus periodic factory audits are typically required for KC Safety Certification, which GB 31241 self/third-party testing does not include; (3) the KC certificate, KC Mark, and Korean-language labelling (capacity, model, certification number) have no equivalent in Chinese domestic export requirements. Differences in national deviations on crush and overcharge acceptance criteria may also require re-evaluation.
gap.zh: 出口商须由KATS指定机构（KTC/KTL/KTR）依据KC 62133取得KC安全认证（안전인증）检测。由于KC 62133与GB 31241均源自IEC 62133，技术内容有重叠，但GB 31241报告不能证明KC符合性。主要差距：（1）须由韩国指定实验室重新检测或评估；（2）KC安全认证通常要求初始工厂检查及定期工厂审核，而GB 31241自检/第三方检测不含此项；（3）KC证书、KC标志及韩文标签（容量、型号、认证编号）在中国国内出口要求中无对应规定。挤压和过充验收准则的国家偏差差异也可能须重新评估。
gap.zht: 出口商須由KATS指定機構（KTC/KTL/KTR）依據KC 62133取得KC安全認證（안전인증）檢測。由於KC 62133與GB 31241均源自IEC 62133，技術內容有重疊，但GB 31241報告不能證明KC符合性。主要差距：（1）須由韓國指定實驗室重新檢測或評估；（2）KC安全認證通常要求初始工廠檢查及定期工廠審核，而GB 31241自檢/第三方檢測不含此項；（3）KC證書、KC標誌及韓文標籤（容量、型號、認證編號）在中國國內出口要求中無對應規定。擠壓和過充驗收準則的國家偏差差異也可能須重新評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — KC Safety Certification (안전인증) to KC 62133 is required before lithium secondary cells and battery packs may be placed on the Korean market under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act; testing by a KATS-designated body plus factory inspection apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Korean market placement requires KC Safety Certification (안전인증) to KC 62133, with type testing by a KATS-designated body (KTC / KTL / KTR), an initial factory inspection, the KC Mark, and Korean-language labelling. Although KC 62133 and GB 31241 share an IEC 62133 lineage, Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the KC conformity assessment, so exporters should arrange Korea-designated-lab testing and prepare for factory inspection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入韩国市场须取得依据KC 62133的KC安全认证（안전인증），由KATS指定机构（KTC/KTL/KTR）进行型式检测、接受初始工厂检查、粘贴KC标志并提供韩文标签。尽管KC 62133与GB 31241同源于IEC 62133，中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足KC合格评定，因此出口商应安排韩国指定实验室检测并准备工厂检查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入韓國市場須取得依據KC 62133的KC安全認證（안전인증），由KATS指定機構（KTC/KTL/KTR）進行型式檢測、接受初始工廠檢查、粘貼KC標誌並提供韓文標籤。儘管KC 62133與GB 31241同源於IEC 62133，中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足KC合格評定，因此出口商應安排韓國指定實驗室檢測並準備工廠檢查。

source.publisher: Korea Product Safety Management System (제품안전정보센터) — KATS
